name: Annotation-Free Furniture Codes: What They Encode, and How Far They Transfer
summary: arXiv:2607.10461v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Layout-based 3D scene synthesizers place each object using two human-annotated channels: a categorical class label and a canonical-pose convention....
description: arXiv:2607.10461v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Layout-based 3D scene synthesizers place each object using two human-annotated channels: a categorical class label and a canonical-pose convention. We ask whether a single self-supervised token derived from object geometry can replace both, and study such tokens directly as a representation, decoupled from any synthesizer. A Finite Scalar Quanti...
author: Benjamin Friedman
